name: Struts: Validator Without Form Field
description: A Struts Validator configuration defines validation for a field that does not exist in the corresponding form, indicating stale validation logic that may not cover newly added form fields.
detection_pattern: META[struts_validation_config] defines validation rules for fields that don't exist in the corresponding STRUCTURAL[action_form], indicating configuration drift where new INGRESS[form_fields] may lack validation
